use_cases: Display developer profile information with technical monospace aesthetic
Showcase product features with interactive rotating border effects
Present portfolio items with RTL language support for international audiences
Create team member cards with hover text color inversion
Design promotional content blocks with geometric pattern backgrounds
ai_summary: A versatile InfoCard component featuring a dark theme with vibrant neon yellow (#DAFF3E) accents and monospace typography. The component includes mouse-tracking border rotation effects, geometric pattern overlays, and full RTL language support for Hebrew and Arabic text. Best suited for tech portfolios, developer profiles, and SaaS dashboards requiring interactive, visually striking card layouts.
